---
title: "Clocks on the Web"
subtitle: "Preliminary Data Results"
date: "2026-03-26"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
---

## I did a zmap!

- Ran a `zmap` ICMP Timestamp scan from an allowed VPS
- Scanned for hosts that respond to ICMP Timestamp requests

## Results

## ICMP Clocksync + HTTP Scanner

- Ran the ICMP clocksync analysis on responding hosts
  - Computed clock offsets using ICMP Timestamp fields
- Then ran the HTTP scanner on each host
  - Checked for open port 80 and `Date:` header presence

## Results

## Next Steps

- Full internet zmap scan
<!-- TODO: add more here -->
